headline: Southern Dam Oversight Puts Focus On Safety, Costs And Valuation
summary: Southern Company (NYSE:SO) received regulatory feedback from FERC on spillway gate design and construction for Oliver Dam. FERC also authorized Southern to proceed with drilling, remediation work, and new piezometer installations at Bartletts Ferry Dam. These steps reflect ongoing oversight of safety, monitoring, and long term performance at two key hydro facilities. For investors watching NYSE:SO, these updates focus attention on how Southern manages its hydro assets and complies with...

headline: Georgia Power continues focus on improving reliability through Grid Investment Program
summary: As access to reliable and affordable energy continues to drive economic growth in Georgia, Georgia Power continues to strengthen and enhance the state's power grid through its Grid Investment Program. Over the last three years, Georgia Power has invested $1.3 billion in grid improvements approved by the Georgia Public Service Commission through the program.
